name: 店铺门面/空间摄影

prompt_template.subject: {business_description}
prompt_template.exterior: clean facade with signage and window display
prompt_template.interior: curated display shelving, consultation area, ambient lighting
prompt_template.lighting: golden hour exterior or warm ambient interior

defaults.exterior: large glass windows, signage, entrance details, potted plants
defaults.lighting: late afternoon warm golden light, interior already glowing
defaults.camera: wide-angle lens, f/8-f/11 for full sharpness

overrides.exterior: full storefront view with window display, entrance, street context

overrides.interior: wide-angle interior showing product displays, furniture, lighting design
close-up vignette of a curated corner: consultation table, product samples, single flower

overrides.camera: top-down bird's eye view showing full floor plan layout

category_tips.coffee_shop: espresso machine visible, warm wood tones, latte art, pastry display
category_tips.beauty_store: illuminated niches, marble counter, product wall, consultation area
category_tips.fashion_boutique: minimalist racks, curated display, premium flooring, mirror accents
category_tips.restaurant: table setting, kitchen pass visible, ambient lighting, menu display
category_tips.gym_studio: modern equipment, branded wall, natural light, motivational signage
category_tips.pop_up: temporary creative installation, bold graphics, unique display fixtures

examples: Storefront photography. Modern {business} with glass windows showing warm interior. Entrance with potted plants. Golden hour light. Architectural photography, 8K

Premium interior photography of {business}. Wide-angle shot showing product displays, consultation area, herringbone floor. Warm ambient lighting throughout. Architectural Digest quality, 8K, 1536x1024px
